title: pavonia hatschbachii
intro: Pavonia hatschbachii, also known as the hairy rock rose, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant is native to Brazil and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pavonia hatschbachii include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pavonia hatschbachii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
